behavior_summary: ETHRSPEL::0080 is an area/ethereal short-range spell process invoked with an entity/item reference at [BP+06h] (the caster or origin).
When run it displays a chant/visual tied to the caster (via METHOD::087D), invokes the LightningBolt spell process, and waits on those visual/spell spawns.

After the visual/spell resolves it iterates nearby NPCs/items and, for any NPC currently targeting the caster, clears their in-combat flag (Npc::clrInCombat) and resets their activity (Npc::cSetActivity(0)) — effectively stopping or pacifying foes that were attacking the caster.
U8P_ETHRSPEL::0114 produces scattered physical debris by randomizing offsets around an origin and creating/hurling items (Item::legal_create, Item::hurl).
U8P_ETHRSPEL::01CE is a chant-wrapper that displays a different chant, runs LightningBolt, and then spawns U8P_ETHRSPEL::0114 to produce debris.

U8P_ETHRSPEL::0225 is a more complex summon/command routine: it displays a chant, computes spawn coordinates, optionally prompts for a target, creates and initializes a summoned NPC with randomized stats (Npc::create and setStr/setInt/setDex/setHp), sets orientation/animations and assigns a target; it may temporarily set avatar stasis during parts of this routine.
notable_control_flow: Start: accept entity/item parameter at [BP+06h] representing the caster/origin.
Spawn a METHOD::087D instance to display chant text associated with the caster and spawn the LightningBolt process; await these spawned processes before continuing.

Iterate over a list/area of nearby objects (loop variable stored in [BP-02h]). For each object: check Npc::isInCombat and Npc::getTarget; if the target equals the caster then call Npc::clrInCombat and Npc::cSetActivity(0).

Helpers: U8P_ETHRSPEL::0114 computes random offsets around the origin and uses Item::legal_create and Item::hurl to produce thrown debris; U8P_ETHRSPEL::01CE triggers a chant + LightningBolt and then spawns the debris helper; U8P_ETHRSPEL::0225 follows a sequence of placement checks, SFX, item frame setup and NPC creation/configuration, optionally prompting the player to pick a victim.
Many branches depend on external call results (LightningBolt return, canExistAt/legal_create outcomes, target() return) and on randomized values from urandom.
open_questions: Is ETHRSPEL::0080 used as both a castable spell and as an enterFastArea trigger (the disassembly suggests both usages but exact in-game event bindings are not explicit)?
What exact item types/frames are created and hurled by U8P_ETHRSPEL::0114 (the code randomizes types/frames but the specific shape ids are not documented here)?
What are the precise conditions or range used to enumerate 'nearby' NPCs/items in the main loop (how the list is sourced is inferred but not explicitly represented)?
In U8P_ETHRSPEL::0225, what are the specific NPC types and SFX ids used for the summoned creature, and what fallback behavior does FIRESPEL::1F4F represent when target() returns certain values?
Does clearing an NPC's in-combat flag fully prevent future hostility or only reset current engagement state (i.e., do NPCs re-engage immediately after)?

main_function.name: U8P_ETHRSPEL::0080
main_function.purpose: Perform a short-range ethereal/area spell effect for the provided caster/origin: show chant/visuals, run LightningBolt, then neutralize nearby NPCs that are targeting the caster by clearing their combat state and resetting activity.
entry_conditions: Invoked as a spell process (likely when the spell is cast) or when an actor enters a fast-area trigger region tied to the spell.
Requires an entity/item reference passed at [BP+06h] identifying the caster/origin.

function_map.name: U8P_ETHRSPEL::0080
function_map.role: Main ethereal-area spell process that displays chant/visuals, invokes LightningBolt, and clears combat state on nearby NPCs targeting the caster.

function_map.name: U8P_ETHRSPEL::0114
function_map.role: Create and hurl several items at randomized offsets around an origin to produce scattered debris/projectile effects.

function_map.name: U8P_ETHRSPEL::01CE
function_map.role: Variant spell wrapper: display a different chant, run LightningBolt, then spawn U8P_ETHRSPEL::0114 to scatter debris.

function_map.name: U8P_ETHRSPEL::0225
function_map.role: Summon/command routine: place a summoned object/NPC, initialize randomized stats, optionally prompt for a target, and assign the summoned creature a target and activity/animations.

function_map.name: METHOD::087D
function_map.role: Engine-spawned method to display chant text/speech or a visual tied to a process/pid.

function_map.name: U8P_ETHRSPEL::LightningBolt (process)
function_map.role: External spell/effect process invoked by the chant wrappers; core visual/damage/effect of the spell sequence.

internal_calls.purpose: After displaying its chant and invoking LightningBolt, spawn the debris/hurl helper to produce scattered physical effects.
Not directly called by U8P_ETHRSPEL::0080 in canonical trace, but 01CE (a variant) delegates to 0114; relationship exists between variant wrappers and the debris helper.
0225 may coordinate with item/frame setup helpers to establish summoned item visuals; linking is inferred from similar creation/pop patterns.

external_calls.purpose: Display chant text or a speech bubble tied to the caster/process (e.g., 'In Quas Wis!').
Execute the LightningBolt spell/effect as part of the ethereal/area spell sequence; return value is used to gate later actions.
Detect NPCs in combat that are targeting the caster, clear their combat state and reset their activity to stop hostilities toward the caster.
Generate random offsets and selection indices used to decide where to create and hurl debris items.
Check placement legality, create item instances and throw them with randomized offsets to produce scattered debris visuals/impacts.
Instantiate a summoned NPC and initialize its attributes with randomized values as part of the summon routine.
Optionally prompt the player to select a target for the summoned creature and temporarily change player stasis during that interaction.
Compute facing/direction and spawn orientation/animation methods for summoned items/NPCs so they are oriented and animated toward targets.
Play short sound effects when items are created/popped or hurled to enhance the visual debris effect.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: ETHRSPEL::0080 is an area/ethereal short-range spell process invoked with an entity/item reference at [BP+06h] (the caster or origin).
